title: CaptainSparklez' Revenge Music Disc
description:
Creeper? Aw man...

This data/resource pack adds CaptainSparklez' Revenge song into Minecraft with a music disc. This is my first mod so I hope you enjoy it!
body:
![Revenge music disc on a jukebox in a copper scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28200c074078ab0b7c509b7c7969d42e0be5b2f6.jpeg)

**This is both a resource pack and a data pack.**

---
**Drag the file into your resource packs and then make a copy of the file and drag it into your worlds data packs folder.**

---
**Once in game, type the following command to obtain the music disc:**

---

```
/function new_music:revenge0
```
**I do not own the song and will not profit off of it.**
